title: Car Air Freshener for Men with Vent Clip | Strong Perfume Automotive Air Freshener | Odour Eliminating Technology with Vent Clip | Car Air Fresheners by Perfa
features: SUPER STRONG SCENT THROW - Engulf your car with the luxurious fragrance of Savage. This car air freshener smells like a strong perfume.

LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE - A car perfume like no other. Lasting up to 1 month before needing to be refilled. Specially formulated to project a strong perfume scent over long periods of time. The best car air fresheners for men are made by Perfa
ODOUR ELIMINATOR TECHNOLOGY - Perfa car fresheners completely eliminate odours. A car air diffuser, taking you back to that new car smell and replacing it with a perfume smelling air freshener car

MADE WITH REAL ESSENTIAL OILS - Made with a blend of fragrance and essential oils, this aromatherapy car scent is a vital car accessory for those lengthy journeys to keep you concentrated for longer periods of driving

SMELL LIKE A PERFUME, NOT A FRUIT - Fed-up of the boring scents of cherries and strawberries? Our luxury car air fresheners for men smells like a perfume and aftershave rather than a car air freshener.
ADJUST THE STRENGTH TO SUIT YOU - Personalise your car smell air freshener to suit your taste. Simply move the wooden stopper up and down the diffuser chords to set the strength to your liking
REFILL AND REUSE - A full range of refills can be found on our shopping page. Fancy a change? Try our Greed car air freshner for men refill or Greed car diffuser to change things up
GIFT-READY PACKAGING - No need to repackage, our stylish, high-end car perfume diffuser comes sealed in a luxury gifting box. Perfect for birthday gifts or any other type of car gift.
PROUDLY MANUFACTURED IN THE UK - The entire car fragrance range by Perfa is made here in the UK to ensure we adhere to the highest of British Standards
OUR PROMISE - No matter the circumstances, if you aren't entirely satisfied with your product, we'll buy them back! That's our promise, to you!
